Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A pseudo BPMN representation of a multinational smartphone supply chain process textual approximation Task Generate 20 open ended thought provoking questions based on this process Focus Areas Rationale behind process flows potential improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement Constraint Do not provide any SQL queries just list the questions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Process Start Market Research to RD Prototype Sourcing Parallel gateway for securing components Taiwan Japan South Korea Germany USA Assembly Ship to Malaysia to Assemble 24 7 Quality Control Exclusive Gateway Pass to Pack Fail to Rework Scrap Logistics Outbound Parallel split Air Freight vs Cargo Ship Clearance Customs and Compliance Distribution Regional DCs to Parallel split Warehousing Retailers E Commerce VIP Feedback Loop Monitor Inventory to Exclusive Gateway Adjust Orders vs Next Cycle End End Event

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Brainstorming Categories and Questions Rationale Design Why Malaysia Why parallel sourcing Why 24 7 assembly Risk Management Supply chain disruptions geopolitical natural disasters component shortages quality failures Improvements Automation sustainability lean manufacturing just in time Decision Making Air vs Sea freight criteria Rework vs Scrap thresholds Inventory adjustment triggers Stakeholders Suppliers regulators retailers customers internal teams Performance Measurement KPIs cycle time defect rates cost efficiency

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine Check against constraints No SQL Yes 20 questions Yes Open ended Yes Thought provoking Yes Ensure variety across the requested focus areas Rationale Improvements Risk Decision Stakeholders Performance

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Some questions might be too similar Lets ensure they cover different stages Refinement Make sure they sound professional and analytical

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Revised List Check Sourcing Strategy Parallel vs Sequential Assembly Location Malaysia Quality Thresholds Rework vs Scrap Logistics Decision Air vs Sea Geopolitical Risk Taiwan USA Forecasting Metrics Inventory Monitor Sustainability 24 7 Energy Customs Bottlenecks Root Cause Analysis Quality Market Research Linkage Supplier Contingency Single point of failure Inventory Balancing DCs Channel Conflict E Comm vs Retail Time to Market Parallel Sourcing Scalability Bottlenecks Cost Benefit Freight RD Assembly Communication Waste Scrap Strategy VIP Prioritization Sales Cycle Feedback Looks good Covers the full lifecycle

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait one more check The prompt asks for open ended thought provoking questions My draft looks solid I will finalize the wording to ensure they invite discussion rather than yes no answers

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Example adjustment Instead of What specific metrics use How are specific metrics Actually What is fine for open ended Instead of How is the decision made use What criteria drive the decision Lets polish them slightly for maximum impact

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This looks like a strong set of 20 questions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Check against No SQL queries constraint None included Check count 20 Check format List Ready to generate response
